update docs and push to git

The user and contact messages that contain an attachement are only return the file size instead of the filename and a link to the file along with the size of the file. maybe if there is no message content, use the name of the file as the message content. and include the link and the file size as additional meta data for the message.

instead of being a message type that is regular, it needs to be an mms type or an attachment type or something similar. This way we can properly style the UI for the message, and we can know who to download the links.
